scope: AgenC policy limits service port: organization restriction fetch, ETag caching, retry/fail-open behavior, remote-auth eligibility, background polling, and synchronous policy checks.

requiredBehaviors: policy-limit responses contain a restrictions record keyed by policy name
each restriction exposes an allowed boolean
invalid cache/API payloads are rejected instead of poisoning the session cache
API-key sessions are eligible without reading provider API-key environment variables in the service
remote-auth sessions are eligible only for team, enterprise, and C4E tiers
C4E subscription responses normalize to the enterprise entitlement used by policy-limit eligibility
ineligible or unauthenticated sessions fail open and do not fetch policy limits
bootstrap injects selected provider/auth state and exposes the service through SessionServices
edgeCases: third-party provider or custom base URL

requiredBehaviors: successful fetches persist restrictions to policy-limits.json with mode 0600
environment endpoint overrides cannot redirect authenticated policy requests away from AgenC-owned or injected loopback test endpoints
cached restrictions produce a deterministic checksum sent as If-None-Match
304 responses reuse the stale cache
404 responses clear stale cache and leave an empty restriction set
transient failures retry with AgenC retry delay arithmetic
auth failures skip retry
edgeCases: cache persistence failure after a valid API response
invalid JSON or invalid response body

requiredBehaviors: known denied policies return false
unknown policies and cache/API misses fail open
allow_product_feedback fails closed only when essential-traffic-only mode is active and no cache exists
Feedback survey prompts call the product-feedback policy helper before showing or uploading survey data
background polling is idempotent and stops on bootstrap shutdown
edgeCases: shutdown after a partially initialized bootstrap
